description:
Plays music defined in [[Description.ext#CfgMusic|Description.ext's CfgMusic]] or config.cpp. If the ''musicName'' could not be found a message is logged into the .rpt file: {{hl|Music <''musicName''> not found}}.
* [[Arma 3: CfgMusic]]
* [[Arma 2: CfgMusic]]
* [[ArmA: Armed Assault: CfgMusic]]
* [[Operation Flashpoint: CfgMusic]]

{{Feature|informative|To stop the music, use <sqf inline>playMusic "";</sqf>.}}
name: playMusic

Item.desc: start, in seconds. Can be negative.
Item.name: start
